case_title: DAVIS JEFFREY ROSS VS CITY TOW, THE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS JEFFREY ROSS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY TOW, THE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO THE CITY TOW, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-18-1992, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO JUN-29-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
